examples: She is a remarkably adroit and determined politician.
The governor has considerable political talents, but as a speaker, he is far less adroit than his opponent, whose oratorical skills are breathtaking.
Through some adroit lawyering, Faal turned that mistake to a decisive advantage.
Japanese banks have been no more adroit (Fuji Bank and Heller Financial in the 1980s).
The company used a performance-based point system to encourage good customer service and adroit massage skills.
